choices.text: LND/CLN/Eclair + running Bitcoin Core full node + Static Channel Backup (SCB) cp'd offsite + watchtower for offline protection. Without backup, drive failure can lose channel funds; without watchtower, vulnerable to old-state attack.

Lightning Pool marketplace, paid services (LNBig, Bitrefill open channels for fee), Loop-out (convert outbound to inbound via Lightning Labs Loop), submarine swaps. Necessary to receive payments; new nodes have zero inbound by default.

questions.explanation: Pool / paid services / Loop / submarine swaps.
